hero.title: Our Services
hero.subtitle: Architectural glass and aluminium solutions covering installation, custom fabrication, and material supply with engineering-grade standards.

expertise.heading: Our Area of Expertise
expertise.description: HAGX connects architectural glass, aluminium fabrication, installation, and material supply through three core capabilities built around engineering standards and accountable delivery.

tracks.title: Complete project installation work
tracks.desc: HAGX controls installation quality through a 100% in-house team, without outsourcing, to deliver refined, accountable, and verifiable workmanship on every project.

tracks.title: Manufacturing and fabrication to standard
tracks.desc: Our factory turns client requirements into durable, precise, and architecturally refined aluminium door and window systems.

tracks.title: Complete material supply and distribution
tracks.desc: We partner with leading construction material brands and support clients with high-quality products, precise processing, and nationwide delivery.

installation.title: Complete project installation work
installation.description: HAGX controls installation quality through a 100% in-house team, without outsourcing, to deliver refined, accountable, and verifiable workmanship on every project.

items.title: Design consultation and problem solving
items.desc: We support design decisions by analyzing engineering solutions and site constraints so the finished work aligns with the design intent.

items.title: Technical shop drawing
items.desc: Detailed technical shop drawings help coordinate professionally with architects and main contractors before fabrication begins.

items.title: Precision site survey
items.desc: Site measurements are taken with high-standard tools to improve production accuracy and reduce installation errors.

items.title: Pre-engineering and quality inspection
items.desc: Components are prepared and system-tested in the factory, then checked against strict QC lists before delivery to site.

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing and fabrication to standard
manufacturing.description: HAGX turns custom requirements into aluminium door and window systems that are durable, precise, and architecturally refined.

items.title: Tailor-made design
items.desc: Custom production based on required specifications, with proposed drawings prepared for approval before production.

items.title: Precision manufacturing
items.desc: Modern machinery supports precise joinery, clean finishing, strength, and accurate alignment.

items.title: Internal system testing
items.desc: Systems are tested inside the factory to verify operation, completeness, and readiness before handover.

items.title: Certified materials
items.desc: We select high-grade materials that meet Thai Industrial Standards and verify coating quality against the required specification.

supply.title: Complete material supply and distribution
supply.description: HAGX supplies quality construction materials and processing services through official partnerships and nationwide logistics.

items.title: Premium glass and customization
items.desc: Raw glass sheets and made-to-order glass services, including edge polishing and cut-to-size processing.

items.title: Aluminium profile and hardware
items.desc: A complete range of aluminium profiles and hardware, including handles, patch fittings, and structural silicone.

items.title: SCG official partnership
items.desc: Official distributor support for SCG products such as gypsum boards and ceiling framing systems.

items.title: Nationwide high-speed logistics
items.desc: Fast and secure delivery across Thailand keeps project material flow moving without unnecessary delay.

cta.title: Work with HAGX
cta.description: Send us your project or material requirements so our team can review the technical details, recommend specifications, and prepare a quotation.

scope_of_works.subtitle: What we install
scope_of_works.footer: And all types of custom-made glass and aluminium solutions — Custom Solutions

categories.title: Residential Doors & Windows
items:
All types of aluminium door and window systems
(Sliding, Casement, Awning, Folding)

desc_installation: A complete service from survey, design, fabrication, and installation by HAGX's own team.
desc_supply: Order glass, aluminium, and hardware at factory-direct pricing with custom cut-to-size options.
